# 2025-12-19 — Friday

Woke before the alarm, which is new.

Worked on the swift test pass. 0.8 is the right knob; 0.85 over-merged, 0.9 missed the obvious near-dupes. Kept it.

Worked on the mlx pass. 0.78 is the right knob; 0.83 over-merged, 0.88 missed the obvious near-dupes. Kept it.

Pushed the fix. Ran mlx twice to be sure.

Priya pushed the pydantic bump. Broke one test. Fixed it without regret — the test was wrong.

Walked to Belém after lunch. Got a coffee at Copenhagen Coffee Lab. Thought about nothing.

Shipping fast only feels good if the rollback is also fast. That's all.
